rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 3/8" Compact Impact Wrench
rows.description: With a Pilot Point; Tip that starts on contact, DEWALT Gold Ferrous Drill Bits deliver clean, accurate holes, and helps to reduced lock-ups. A No-Spin Shank eliminates the bit spinning in the chuck, and a tapered web provides helps to increased durability to helps to reduce breakage. Size markings are located above the shank to helps to prevent wearing.
features: Compact and ergonomic with only 5.5" head length and 2 lbs (tool only)
DEWALT built brushless motor for increased efficiency and runtime
Max torque of 150 ft-lbs in a compact package for a variety of different fastening applciations
additional_features: 3 LEDs and a belt clip for additional ease of use

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 1/2 in. Mid-Range Impact Wrench With Hog Ring Anvil (Tool Only)
rows.description: When you need the perfect balance of high performance and size to get tough jobs done, use this new 20V MAX* XR Cordless 1/2 in. Mid-Range Impact Wrench with Hog Ring Anvil. This power tool delivers 600 ft-lbs of max fastening torque and 800 ft-lbs. of max breakaway torque for challenging projects. Designed to help prevent overtightening in forward, and run-off in reverse, the wrench integrates a Precision Wrench setting to help optimize user control. Utilize the updated 4-mode push button switch to easily transition speeds when needed. This Impact Wrench brings high torque and weighs less than 4 lbs. (Tool only), making it ideal for pipe flanges, grooved couplings, tilt wall braces, wheel lugs, concrete anchor setting and many other applications where high torque is needed in compact spaces. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Tackle Wide Range Of Fastening Applications - With 600 ft-lbs of max fastening torque and 800 ft-lbs of max breakaway torque
Choose The Output Level Based On The Job - Control is in your hands with 4 speed settings and a variable speed trigger
Helps Prevent Overtightening And Fastener Run-Off - With Precision Wrench control
additional_features: Illuminate Dark Workspaces - Using the on-tool LED work light
Built For Comfortable Use - When working in tight spaces with compact and lightweight design

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 1/2 in. Mid-Range Cordless Impact Wrench With Detent Pin Anvil (Tool Only)
rows.description: The 20V MAX* XR 1/2 in. Mid-Range Cordless Impact Wrench with Detent Pin Anvil delivers up to 330 ft-lbs max of fastening torque and a lightweight, ergonomic design. This tool also features Precision Wrench Control, which helps to prevent overtightening in forward and fastener run-off in reverse. This Mid-Range Cordless Impact Wrench is ideal for grooved couplings, pipe flanges, wheel lugs, concrete anchor setting, and many other applications where a lot of torque is needed in a compact space. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Up to 330 ft-lbs max of fastening torque at only 3.48lbs

Includes the new Precision Wrench Control feature, which helps add more control when using the tool in forward and reverse. In Forward, the tool will pause before impacting to help prevent overtightening. In Reverse, the tool lowers speed when fastener is loose to help prevent run-off.
3 mode settings to complete a variety of applications
additional_features: DEWALT-built brushless motor for increased efficiency and runtime vs. brushed model
Variable speed trigger helps to provide speed control
LED light to help illuminate dimly lit areas
Compact and lightweight design for comfort when working in tight spaces
includes: (1) DCF894 Mid-Range Impact Wrench With Detent Pin Anvil
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* Tool Connect 1/2 in. Mid-Range Detent Pin Anvil (Tool Only)
rows.description: The DCF896 Mid-Range Impact Wrench is based off of the latest edition to the DEWALT impact wrench family, the DCF894. Integrated Bluetooth technology pairs this tool with the free Tool Connect mobile app and online inventory manager portal, allowing users to track, manage and customize the tool settings. Through the app, users are able to program three customized modes based on individual needs and have control over forward and reverse speed to account for different fastener sizes and types, LED brightness and delay as well as Precision Wrench and the all new exclusive Precision Tap modes. Within Precision Wrench, users can program the tool to automatically shut off after impacting for a set amount of time, useful for those performing repeatable applications and helps with tightening consistancy by removing variability in impact time. Precision Tap mode is designed to make tapping threads faster and easier by having the tool automatically alternate between forward and reverse, keeping rotations consistant and eliminating the need to manually change the tool's direction. Use this tool along with other Tool Connect offerings for a complete management solution. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 330 ft-lbs of max fastening torque and 600 ft-lbs of max breakaway torque to complete a wide variety of applications.
Compact design of only 6.95" and 3.48 lbs allows access to tight spaces and reduces user fatigue.

3 fully customizable modes allow you to personalize your impact wrench through the Tool Connect app including setting: Speed, LED brightness and delay, Precision Wrench Control and Precision Tap Controls.
additional_features: Precision Wrench allows user to set runoff speed in reverse helping to prevent fastener runoff. In forward, users can set pause before impact and auto shut off times to aide in fastening consistency.
Precision Tap automatically alternates the tool between forward and reverse allowing for easier and faster cutting of threads (vs. manual tapping).
Brushless motor for increased efficiency and runtime vs. brushed models.
Variable speed trigger helps provide speed control to the user.
Through the Tool Connect app receive diagnostics on your impact wrench such as internal coin cell battery life, tool temperature, number of trigger pulls and how long the tool has been running.

Track your tool utilizing the last seen feature which provides the street address of where your tool was last in range of a Tool Connect enabled device. Help prevent theft by setting the tool to disable when out of range and receiving out of range alerts.
Easily and quickly assign tools to jobsites and users on fthe Tool Connect Inventory Manager Software, increasing accountabilty and reducing lost tools.
includes: (1) DCF896 Impact Wrench w/ Detent Pin Anvil
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.description: Complete difficult wood drilling applications and work efficiently with the 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 7/16 in. Impact Wrench (battery and charger sold separately). This next-generation XR tool delivers power, speed, and ergonomics in a 41% more compact†† design. This impact wrench features 4 modes including Timber Screw mode that helps increase the speed of wood driving applications. As our fastest drilling 20V MAX* 7/16 in. Impact Wrench† and our fastest driving 20V MAX* 7/16 in. Impact Wrench†, the 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 7/16 in. Impact Wrench is a part of our best performing line of 20V MAX* power tools.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 1/2 in. Brushless High Torque Impact Wrench With Hog Ring Anvil (Tool Only
rows.description: Complete tough jobs utilizing the power of the 20V MAX* XR 1/2" High Torque Impact Wrench. The industry's highest rated max torque cordless 1/2" impact wrench** delivers up to 28% more torque*** when using XR POWERSTACK (sold separately), making it ideal heavy-duty applications. This tool features a glass-filled nylon housing to help protect against oils and harmful solvents. Other features such as PRECISION WRENCH mode, which helps prevent overtightening and fastener run-off, as well as a 4-mode push button switch, to easily change speeds and LED brightness, are included to help maximize efficiency and productivity on the jobsite. Battery sold separately.

3 SPEED SETTINGS AND PRECISION WRENCH MODE - to help prevent overtightening and fastening run-off
